zh.lifeSummary: 當Joanne Ligon於1653年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可時，她的父親Colonel Thomas Ligon III21歲，母親Mary Harris28歲。她於1672年與Robert Hancock在美國維吉尼亞州亨利可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1728年11月7日在她的家鄉享年75歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joanne Ligon于1653年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可时，她的父亲Colonel Thomas Ligon III21岁，母亲Mary Harris28岁。她于1672年与Robert Hancock在美国弗吉尼亚州亨利可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1728年11月7日在她的家乡享年75岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可。

nameMeanings.name: Ligon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Lygon, the name of an aristocratic English family said to be of Norman origin. It is of unexplained etymology (but compare French name below).
French: from the personal name Higon, a southern French variant of Hugo, with fused definite article l'.
Polish (also Ligoń): nickname from a derivative of Old Polish ligać ‘to lie’ or ‘to kick up a fuss’.

variants.name: Ligons
meanings: English: variant of Ligon , with excrescent excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Joanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

variants.name: Johanne
meanings: and Norwegian feminine form of   Johan .

variants.name: Joann
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

en.lifeSummary: When Joanne Ligon was born in 1653, in Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America, her father, Colonel Thomas Ligon III, was 21 and her mother, Mary Harris, was 28. She married Robert Hancock in 1672, in Henrico, Virginia, United States. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 7 November 1728, in her hometown, at the age of 75, and was buried in Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joanne Ligon est née en 1653, à Henrico, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Colonel Thomas Ligon III, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Mary Harris, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Hancock en 1672, à Henrico, Virginie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 7 novembre 1728, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterrée à Henrico, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joanne Ligon 1653 in Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Colonel Thomas Ligon III 21 und ihre Mutter Mary Harris 28. Sie hat 1672 in Henrico, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten Robert Hancock geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 7. November 1728 im Alter von 75 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joanne Ligon è nata il nel 1653 nel Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America, sua padre, Colonel Thomas Ligon III, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Mary Harris, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Robert Hancock nel 1672, nel Henrico, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 7 novembre 1728, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolta a Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Joanne Ligonが1653年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ヘンリコで生まれた時，父Colonel Thomas Ligon IIIは21歳，母Mary Harrisは28歳であった。1672年にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州ヘンリコでRobert Hancockと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1728年11月7日に故郷で75歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ヘンリコにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joanne Ligon(이)가 1653년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 헨리코에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Colonel Thomas Ligon III(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Harris(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1672년 미국 버지니아 주 헨리코에서 Robert Hancock(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1728년 11월 7일 그녀의 고향에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 헨리코에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joanne Ligon nasceu em 1653, em Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America, seu pai, Colonel Thomas Ligon III, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Mary Harris, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Hancock em 1672, em Henrico, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 7 de novembro de 1728, em sua cidade natal, com 75 anos, e foi sepultada em Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ru.Malvern Hill, Roanoke County, Virginia,: малвирн хиллс, роанок, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joanne Ligon родилась в 1653 г. в местности хенрику, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Colonel Thomas Ligon III было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Mary Harris, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Hancock в 1672 г. в местности хенрику, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 7 ноября 1728 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 75 лет и была похоронена в местности хенрику, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика.

Se casó con Robert Hancock en 1672, en Henrico, Virginia, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 7 de noviembre de 1728, en su pueblo, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultada en Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America.
